description: Sri Lankan Airlines Limited, Airline Centre, Bandaranaike International Airport, Vs Commissioner General of Labour, Labour Secretariat, before Hon. Adithya Patabendige, J.
parties: Sri Lankan Airlines Limited, Airline Centre, Bandaranaike International Airport, Vs Commissioner General of Labour, Labour Secretariat,
keywords: Writ of Certiorari, Writ of Prohibition, Reduction of Salary during Covid-19 Pandemic due to the Economic Hardship by the Employer.
legistation: Article 140 of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Section 2, 3, 3D, 64, 65 of the Wages Boards Ordinance.
